description.en: Draft a backend architecture proposal for your company project, including pattern choice, domain/module structure, FastAPI router organization, and key risks.
description.es: Redacta una propuesta de arquitectura backend para el proyecto de tu empresa, incluyendo elección de patrón, estructura de dominios/módulos, organización de routers en FastAPI y riesgos clave.

sharing.en: I just completed Backend Architecture Proposal with LearnPack @4GeeksAcademy. Check it out: https://github.com/4GeeksAcademy/ai-engineering-syllabus/tree/main/content/projects/ai-eng-architectural-proposal #AIEngineering #LearnPack #4GeeksAcademy #architecture #fastapi #backenddesign
